name: io.github.shane-js/ghostfree
title: GhostFree
description: MCP server that scans your repo's dependencies for security vulnerabilities based on published CVEs.

packageArguments.name: --repo-path
packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the repository to scan for vulnerable dependencies.

environmentVariables.name: GHOSTFREE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override the directory where GhostFree stores its data files (accepted-risks.yml, config.yml). Defaults to .ghostfree/ in the scanned repository root.

environmentVariables.name: GHOSTFREE_MIN_SEVERITY
environmentVariables.description: Minimum CVE severity level to surface. One of: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM (default), LOW.

environmentVariables.name: NVD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional NVD API key for higher rate limits when enriching CVE details. Free to request at https://nvd.nist.gov/developers/request-an-api-key.
